scenario_results.reason: AS2 onboarding guidance includes identifiers, certificates, MDN behavior, retry expectations, and validation checkpoints.
X12 review covers envelope assumptions, acknowledgments, control numbers, and partner-specific unknowns explicitly.
EDIFACT guidance stays standards-aware and includes CONTRL, delimiters, and agreement-level validation.
SFTP onboarding plan addresses SSH keys, path ownership, replay controls, and retention hygiene.
FTPS troubleshooting isolates likely protocol and connectivity causes without drifting into full network-architecture ownership.
Connect:Direct recovery plan prioritizes safe replay, backlog handling, and rollback boundaries.
Modernization guidance compares BizTalk and Logic Apps capabilities and defines phased migration with rollback.
Sterling incident handling addresses duplicate suppression, replay safety, and operational monitoring updates.
Certificate rollover guidance covers partner communication, validation, nonrepudiation, and fallback timing.
Risk prioritization remains actionable and weighs protocol security, partner complexity, and rollback feasibility.
Adjacent API-led integration work is rejected clearly and routed back to the orchestrator.
Low-confidence behavior requests missing implementation guides and partner data instead of guessing.

notes: Scenario count exceeds the issue minimum (12 >= 10).
Pass rate exceeds the acceptance threshold (1.00 >= 0.92).
No unreviewed regressions were recorded and human verification is reflected in readiness evidence.
